10 OVERDOSAGE
1.1 Indication
11 DESCRIPTION
1.2 Limitations of Use
12 CLINICAL PHARMACOLOGY

Olux-E® Foam is indicated for the treatment of inflammatory and pruritic manifestations of
corticosteroid-responsive dermatoses in patients 12 years and older.
